mapper.sql: e.book_id, e.book_title, e.author, e.isbn, e.publisher, e.publish_date, e.book_intro, e.category_id, e.cover_img, e.page_count, e.price, e.language, e.tags, e.rating, e.rating_count, e.status, e.create_time, e.update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_ebook e LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON e.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_ebook_file ef ON e.book_id = ef.book_id WHERE e.book_id = #{bookId} AND e.status = 1 GROUP BY e.book_id
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.book_id) FROM tb_ebook e LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON e.category_id = c.category_id

SELECT
FROM tb_ebook e LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON e.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_ebook_file ef ON e.book_id = ef.book_id WHERE e.status = 1 GROUP BY e.book_id ORDER BY e.rating DESC, e.rating_count DESC, e.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM tb_ebook e LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON e.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_ebook_file ef ON e.book_id = ef.book_id WHERE e.status = 1 GROUP BY e.book_id ORDER BY e.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM tb_ebook e LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON e.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_ebook_file ef ON e.book_id = ef.book_id WHERE e.category_id = #{categoryId} AND e.status = 1 GROUP BY e.book_id ORDER BY e.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ebook e WHERE e.category_id = #{categoryId} AND e.status = 1
SELECT book_id FROM tb_ebook WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM tb_ebook e LEFT JOIN tb_category c ON e.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN tb_ebook_file ef ON e.book_id = ef.book_id WHERE e.book_id IN
#{bookId}
AND e.status = 1 GROUP BY e.book_id ORDER BY e.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ebook SET rating = #{rating}, rating_count = #{ratingCount}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
